mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM member m JOIN parent p ON m.id = p.mb_id AND p.auth_read = '1' JOIN child c ON c.ch_seq = p.ch_seq AND (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE m.id = #{memberId}::uuid ORDER BY c.is_primary desc, c.ch_seq
SELECT * FROM child WHERE ch_seq = #{childId} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y') ORDER BY is_primary desc, ch_seq

SELECT ch_seq, month, height, weight FROM ( SELECT c.ch_seq, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', h.reg_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month, h.height, h.weight, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY h.ch_seq, DATE_TRUNC('month', h.reg_date) ORDER BY h.reg_date DESC ) rn FROM child c JOIN child_grow_history h ON c.ch_seq = h.ch_seq AND (h.delete_yn IS NULL OR h.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') AND c.ch_seq = #{childId} AND h.reg_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '4 months') ) sub WHERE rn < 6 ORDER BY month

SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS week
TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + ((EXTRACT(day FROM TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::int - 1) / 7) * INTERVAL '7 days')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS week
TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::date, 'YYYY-MM') AS week
TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('year', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::date, 'YYYY') AS week
TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + ((EXTRACT(day FROM TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::int - 1) / 7) * INTERVAL '7 days')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS week
, MAX(NULLIF(gh.height, '0')) AS total_height , MAX(NULLIF(gh.weight, '0')) AS total_weight FROM child c JOIN child_grow_history gh ON c.ch_seq = gh.ch_seq AND (gh.delete_yn IS NULL OR gh.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') AND c.ch_seq = #{childId} AND gh.gh_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
(DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + ((EXTRACT(day FROM TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::int - 1) / 7) * INTERVAL '7 days')::date
DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
DATE_TRUNC('year', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
(DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) + ((EXTRACT(day FROM TO_DATE(gh.gh_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))::int - 1) / 7) * INTERVAL '7 days')::date
ORDER BY week
mapper.update: UPDATE child SET is_primary = 'N' WHERE ch_seq IN ( SELECT p.ch_seq FROM parent p WHERE p.mb_id = #{memberId}::uuid ) AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')
UPDATE child SET is_primary = 'Y' WHERE ch_seq = #{childId} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')
